case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. DAVID BEAUPRE

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUPRE, DAVID SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2018
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036462) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUPRE, DAVID
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAUPRE, DAVID $14,195.12 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $462.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,582.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
